title: External DocC Archive Registry
description: Pinned external DocC archives consumed by docs.21.dev via `docc merge`. Also records per-archive search-indexability metadata (`indexablePages`) and breadcrumb display-name overrides (`knownNames`), plus cross-cutting `globals` for site-wide hub pages and shared display names.

globals.description: Cross-cutting metadata not owned by any single archive.

hubs.description: Truly cross-cutting navigation pages that should be search-indexable AND don't belong to any single archive (e.g., the merged docs root). Per-archive module landing pages and namespace hubs (e.g., `documentation/<module>` or `documentation/<module>/<umbrella>`) belong in that archive's `indexablePages` instead, since they co-version with the archive's tag.

knownNames.description: Display-name overrides applied across all archives (e.g., `documentation` → `API Reference`, `gettingstarted` → `GettingStarted`).

archives.description: Map of archive identifier to pin spec.

artifact.description: Filename of the .doccarchive.zip asset on the release.

sha256.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 digest of the artifact (lowercase, 64 chars).

bundleID.description: Expected DocC bundle ID from the archive's metadata.json `bundleID` field.

indexablePages.description: DocC page paths (relative to site root, no leading slash, no `index.html`) that should be search-indexable. Pages not in this list receive `<meta name="robots" content="noindex, follow">`.

knownNames.description: Display-name overrides for breadcrumb rendering, scoped to this archive's URL segments. Maps lowercased URL slug to PascalCase or property-name display form (e.g., `torclient` → `TorClient`).
